title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
summary: Anthropic's suspension of access to new models has prompted Indian tech leaders to reassess the country's artificial intelligence strategy and independence. The incident is being viewed as a potential catalyst for India to accelerate its own AI development capabilities and reduce reliance on external platforms.
content: Tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India’s AI ambitions.

zh.title: 随着Anthropic暂停新模型的访问权限，印度讨论其AI的未来
zh.summary: 由于Anthropic暂停新模型的访问权限，印度科技领导者被促使重新评估该国的人工智能战略和独立性。这一事件被视为印度加快自身AI发展能力并减少对外部平台依赖的潜在催化剂。

title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing’s demand
summary: Meta is dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition following a directive from Beijing to reverse the deal. The company is working to unwind the investment in response to Chinese government pressure.
content: Meta starts dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition after Beijing ordered the deal reversed.

zh.title: Meta据称在北京要求后准备放弃20亿美元Manus交易
zh.summary: Meta在北京的指令下正在清算其20亿美元的Manus收购。该公司正应对中国政府压力而努力解除这项投资。
